creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-05-08 10:21:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-Apache-Htgroup Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Manage Apache htgroup files. Please note that this is not a mod_perl
  module. Please also note that there is another module that does similar
  things (HTTPD::UserManage) and that this is a more simplistic module, not
  doing all the things that one does.
  
  PR:             ports/144875
  Submitted by:   otaviof at gmail.com
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2618    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/www/p5-Apache-Htgroup/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-Apache-Htgroup/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/www/p5-Apache-Htgroup/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-Apache-Htgroup/pkg-plist (new)
